title: Lastrea setigera
taxonomy: Lastrea setigera is classified within the family Blechnaceae, commonly known as the water fern family. This family consists of about 100 species of ferns. Lastrea setigera, specifically, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It is often classified in the order Polypodiales, a group of ferns that also includes many other species commonly known as polypody ferns. The classification of Lastrea setigera can also include the subclass Polypodiidae and the class Polypodiopsida, further categorizing this species within the ferns kingdom.
uses: Lastrea setigera has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
